mnemonics: NLP CIE: Never Leave Practicals, Continuously Internalize Everything
keyPoints: Continuous evaluation assesses practical NLP skills like text preprocessing and model building throughout the semester.
It often includes projects implementing algorithms such as sentiment analysis or named entity recognition.
The evaluation focuses on applying theoretical concepts to real-world language data problems.
commonMistakes: Focusing only on theory and neglecting hands-on coding practice for NLP tasks.
Underestimating the importance of data preprocessing and cleaning for NLP projects.
Confusing similar NLP concepts like stemming vs. lemmatization or TF-IDF vs. word embeddings in practical applications.
